message:
chore: disable all Copilot workflows — issues handled by Claude Code (#5291)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   ai-fix:
+    if: false # Copilot disabled — issues handled by Claude Code scanner
     uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-ai-fix.yml@main
     with:
       issue_number: ${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}

@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ run-name: "Auto-Triage on Copilot Assignment"
 jobs:
   activation:
     needs: pre_activation
-    if: needs.pre_activation.outputs.activated == 'true'
+    if: false # Copilot disabled — issues handled by Claude Code scanner
     runs-on: ubuntu-slim
     permissions:
       contents: read
@@ -243,6 +243,7 @@ jobs:
           retention-days: 1
 
   agent:
+    if: false # Copilot disabled — issues handled by Claude Code scanner
     needs: activation
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:
@@ -838,7 +839,7 @@ jobs:

       - agent
       - safe_outputs

+    if: false # Copilot disabled — issues handled by Claude Code scanner
     runs-on: ubuntu-slim
     permissions:
       contents: read
@@ -939,6 +940,7 @@ jobs:

   pre_activation:
+    if: false # Copilot disabled — issues handled by Claude Code scanner

       activated: ${{ steps.check_membership.outputs.is_team_member == 'true' }}

     permissions:
       contents: read

   # and sending noisy email notifications.
   gate:

     steps:
       - run: echo "Event ${{ github.event_name }} received"

   override-dco-for-bots:
-    if: |
-      github.event_name == 'check_run' &&
